challenge.parse.description: Parse a WWW-Authenticate Payment challenge header into a canonical challenge object.

challenge.format.description: Format a canonical challenge object as a WWW-Authenticate Payment header.

credential.parse.description: Parse an Authorization Payment credential header into a canonical credential object.

credential.format.description: Format a canonical credential object as an Authorization Payment header.

receipt.parse.description: Parse a Payment-Receipt header into a canonical receipt object.

receipt.format.description: Format a canonical receipt object as a Payment-Receipt header value.

base64url.encode.description: Encode UTF-8 text as unpadded RFC4648 base64url text.

base64url.decode.description: Decode unpadded RFC4648 base64url text into UTF-8 text.

challenge.id.description: Generate a deterministic challenge id from canonical challenge id parameters.

stripe.external_id_binding.description: Verify Stripe charge receipt attribution uses only the server-bound request externalId and cannot be forged from credential payload.

http.payment_request.description: Send one normalized HTTP request through the SDK payment-aware transport.

server.verify.description: Verify one normalized server credential against route parameters and return the normalized verification outcome.

tempo.fee_payer.cosign.description: Co-sign a Tempo fee-payer envelope with a sponsor and enforce sponsor policy.

tempo.receipt.verify.description: Verify a Tempo credential against a supplied receipt fixture. This is an optional staged capability until full signed transaction verification vectors are available.
